evals.name: Optimize 5 Tokyo POIs into 2 days
evals.description: 5 POIs from different Tokyo neighborhoods should cluster geographically and respect opening hours.
assertions: Output is valid JSON with daily_itinerary array of length 2
Each day has pois array where every POI has a non-empty time_slot
No POI time_slot starts before its opening_hours start time
No POI time_slot ends after day_end (19:00)
Time slots within each day are chronologically ordered
lat and lng fields are present on every POI
transit_from_prev_min is present on every POI
Each day has at least one meal placeholder in meals array
Geographically close POIs cluster together (Asakusa+Ueno on one day, Shinjuku+Shibuya on another)
All 5 POIs appear in output (none in _unscheduled)
evals.test_data_note: tokyo-5pois.json: Senso-ji (Asakusa), Ueno Park (Ueno), Meiji Jingu (Harajuku), Shibuya Crossing (Shibuya), Shinjuku Gyoen (Shinjuku)

evals.name: Insert teamLab into 3-day itinerary
evals.description: Add teamLab Borderless (Odaiba/Azabudai) to an existing 3-day Tokyo itinerary. Should land on the geographically nearest day.
assertions: Output has same number of days as input (3)
The new POI 'teamLab Borderless' appears exactly once in output
All original POIs are preserved (none removed)
_navigator_insert_result is present with success=true
_navigator_insert_result contains inserted_day and disruption_minutes
The inserted POI has a valid time_slot within opening hours
The inserted POI has lat and lng fields

evals.name: Tight opening hours edge case
evals.description: 4 POIs where 2 have very narrow opening windows. Tests constraint satisfaction and _unscheduled handling.
assertions: Output has daily_itinerary array of length 1
POIs with narrow opening windows are scheduled within their hours
No time_slot overlaps within the day (each POI ends before next starts)
If a POI cannot fit, it appears in _unscheduled with a reason string
Scheduled POIs have chronologically ordered time_slots
